transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Riverbend Health Scheduling. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Alvarez. It's currently on the 14th.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your member ID, please?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, it's R-A-K, four four seven one nine.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, R-A-T, four four seven one nine. What new date works for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Um, can we move it to the 21st, same time, around 10 AM?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I've moved your appointment with Dr. Alvarez to the 21st at 10 AM. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, thank you. Oh, and can you check if that clinic takes my insurance, Meridian Plus?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check that for you now... yes, Meridian Plus is accepted at that location.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set. Have a great rest of your day.
